name: OKKY
description: OKKY — Koreas largest developer community with a public Q&A feed, jobs board and event API.

seo.title: OKKY — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: OKKY: OKKY — Koreas largest developer community with a public Q&A feed, jobs board and event API.

when_to_use: Engaging with Korea's developer community for tech discussions
Discovering Korean-language development resources and job boards
Sharing technical content and seeking peer code review in Korean

pros: Largest active KR developer Q&A community
Jobs board API for KR hiring integrations
Event listings for meetups and conferences
Free read access for most endpoints
cons: API is community-driven, not enterprise SLA
review.verdict: A must-use data source for KR dev-tooling and HR products, essentially irrelevant outside Korea.
review.best_for: Products targeting Korean developers for jobs or community

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
